raw_consumer_statement:
Im writing to provide all the details regarding my ongoing dispute with XXXX XXXX, referenced under Dispute XXXX, which I have recently reopened. 

The merchant marked the items as delivered, but I never received them. There is no valid proof that I personally signed for or accepted the package. Despite this, my original dispute was closed based only on tracking statuswhich does not confirm actual delivery to me. 

I chose American Express because of its strong reputation for protecting cardholders in exactly these kinds of situations. I acted in good faith, reported the issue promptly, and expected your support through the chargeback process. 

I am respectfully requesting that you review this again and approve my chargeback, as I should not be held financially responsible for merchandise that was never received.
